name: Jelly Garden Game
description: Jelly Garden Game is an addictive and fun candy matching game! Pop colorful and delicious jelly beans, overcome obstacles by matching them, use special powers, advance through levels, and become the leader in the candy kingdom! Are you ready for a sugar-filled adventure with Jelly Garden? Swap, match, and blast your way through a colorful world full of jellies, candies, and fun challenges. With hundreds of juicy levels, exciting power-ups, and adorable graphics, Jelly Garden is the perfect game to relax and enjoy anywhere, anytime!
instructions: Left Mouse Click or tap to play
